ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT( $User.Id = '0054J000002PIdC' || $User.Id = '0054J000002Q8am' || $User.Id = '0054J000002QSkU' || $User.Id = '0054J000004QaYN' || $User.Id = '0054J000004RQEhQAO') && (RecordTypeId <> '0124J000000hAuRQAU' && RecordTypeId <>'0124J000000hAuVQAU') && ISCHANGED(Status) && OR( ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status),"Closed" ), ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Status),"Caneclled" ) ) && $Profile.Name <> 'Integration Profile'
